turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Good morning, Willowgate Furniture deliveries, Priya speaking. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Hi, I bought a sofa and a bookcase in your store last week, and I'd like to arrange the delivery, please.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: I can certainly do that. Could I take your order number first? It's on the top of your receipt.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Yes, it's W-as-in-Willow, then four-nine-two-seven. So W4927.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Lovely, I've found the order. And could I confirm the name on the account?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: It's Whitcombe. W-H-I-T-C-O-M-B-E.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Thank you, Mr Whitcombe. Now, the delivery address — is it the same as the billing address, or somewhere different?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Different, actually. Please deliver it to eight Rosewood Lane — no, sorry, it's Rosewood Close. Eight Rosewood Close.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Eight Rosewood Close, got it. And the postcode there?

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: It's D-E-two-two, six-A-L. DE22 6AL.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Perfect. Now, both of your items are in stock, so we can deliver quite soon. Would you prefer a weekday or the weekend? Weekend slots do carry a small surcharge of nine pounds fifty.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: I work from home on Wednesdays, so a Wednesday would be ideal — no surcharge, and I'll definitely be in.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: Let me see. I could offer you Wednesday the twelfth — hmm, actually the van's fully booked that day. Let me correct that. The next available Wednesday is the nineteenth.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: The nineteenth is fine. What sort of time?

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: We can't give an exact time, but we'll text you a two-hour window the evening before. Deliveries run between eight in the morning and six in the evening. Now, one important question — is there step-free access, or are there stairs? Our team needs to know for the sofa.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: There's a lift in the building, so no stairs to worry about. The flat's on the third floor but the lift goes right up.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: That makes life easy. Our crew will carry it to the room of your choice and take away all the packaging for recycling, at no extra cost. If you'd like the old sofa removed as well, that's an additional fifteen pounds.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Yes, please, do take the old one — that's worth fifteen pounds to me. And how do I pay the delivery charge?

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: The standard weekday delivery itself is free. So you'll just pay the fifteen pounds for removal, and the driver will take that by card on the day. You'll also get a phone call about half an hour before they arrive.

turns.speaker: Tom
turns.text: Brilliant. That all sounds very straightforward. Thanks for your help, Priya.

turns.speaker: Priya
turns.text: My pleasure. You're all booked for Wednesday the nineteenth. Have a lovely day.

questions.prompt_text: Access to the flat is by ______ (no stairs).

questionGroups.prompt: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

questions.prompt_text: The delivery team will remove all the ______ for recycling free of charge.
The driver will phone about ______ minutes before arriving.
